examples: The heroic leader charged into battle, ready to smite the enemy.
And the angel of the Lord shall smite him.
God isn’t going to smite you for not formally worshipping him.
Pietersen also soon succumbed missing a delivery from off-spinner Amit Jaggernauth that he was attempting to smite to the leg-side.
Niall O'Brien shrugged off an ankle injury to smite 40 off 25 balls and Kevin added 33 over the closing overs.
